form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 11 months 5th of 10 at Sha Tin on March 22 over 1200m, 4 len behind Hot Delight carrying 54.5kg at $59. Previously second-up 3rd of 13 at Te Rapa in the LR Waikato Vet on May 3 over 1400m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Towering Vision with 57kg at $12.90. Is a second up winner in the past but looks tested in this line-up.
